title: hash-bench algorithm catalogue (v3)
description: The algorithm metadata catalogue emitted by `hash-bench metadata`. v3 adds structured use-case tags: keyed, dos_resistant, hardware_required, hardware_features.

name.description: Algorithm display name; joins with benchmark results together with `variant`.

variant.description: Implementation tag — e.g. "sw", "sha-ext", "aes-ext", "clmul", "crc-ext". `(name, variant)` is the unique catalogue key.

crate.description: Backing crate as published on crates.io.

output_bits.description: Digest width in bits (the benchmarked width for XOFs).

internally_parallel.description: Whether the algorithm parallelises a single stream internally.

keyed.description: Whether the benchmarked entry consumes a key.

dos_resistant.description: Whether the entry is a keyed hash with documented HashDoS hardening. Implies `keyed = true`.

hardware_required.description: Whether this variant requires a specific ISA feature to execute.

hardware_features.description: ISA feature labels this variant relies on (e.g. `sha-ni`, `pclmulqdq`). Empty for `sw`.
